rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when they describe interface behavior, not implementation details
Use visible identifiers from the AADL model for all AGREE expressions and declarations
generic_rules: Generate AGREE contracts inside annex agree blocks with valid component type or implementation scope
Ensure all expressions use compatible data types and visible symbols from the AADL model
Encode only explicitly stated numeric bounds as AGREE assumptions or guarantees
Avoid introducing package-qualified identifiers or AADL properties as AGREE variables
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use const, eq, assume, and guarantee keywords with proper AGREE syntax in annex blocks
Define boolean range checks using expressions like value >= lower_limit and value <= upper_limit
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type contracts
Do not assume numeric bounds unless explicitly stated in the requirement
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing parameters
